cases.description: Rule feedback review triggers the skill
cases.prompt: review the collected rule feedback and propose improvements
expectations: Groups observations by ruleName and sorts by priority (user-correction first)
Presents a summary table before diving into individual reviews
Proposes changes one at a time, waiting for Approve/Reject/Skip/Edit
Loads feedback and presents the priority table

cases.description: Empty feedback directory surfaces clear guidance
expectations: Detects the feedback directory is empty or absent
Explains that codi-rule-feedback collects observations during coding sessions

cases.description: Creating a new rule does NOT trigger refine-rules
cases.prompt: create a new rule for our Python naming conventions

cases.description: General rule audit without collected feedback routes elsewhere
cases.prompt: audit all our rules for quality
expectations: Does NOT activate refine-rules skill (it reviews collected feedback, not raw rules)
Routes to codi-compare-preset for upstream comparison or a direct review
